title: Cryptex Exploration Pack
body:
**Embark on an epic expedition through the uncharted frontiers of Minecraft with "Cryptex Exploration Pack", a modpack designed to ignite the spirit of discovery and adventure.**

**New Biomes:**

"Cryptex Exploration Pack" adds 70+ new Biomes to the Overworld, 24+ new Biomes + 20 new types of Enderman to the End and many new Biomes to the Nether and also a ton of new Items and Advancements for each of them!

**Optimization:**

"Cryptex Exploration Pack" aims to provide a base of the best optimization mods available.

**Quality of Life:** 

"Cryptex Exploration Pack" also adds some Quality of Life mods such as:
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)
- [Fabric Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
  
and many more!
